name: Code Geass: Rozé of the Recapture
original_name: コードギアス 奪還のロゼ
overview: Year Seven of the Kowa Period, in the former Hokkaido Block, live brothers known as the Nameless Mercenaries. The Emperor, Callis al Britannia, tries to plunge the world into chaos with the help of his servant, Norland, and his Einberg Knights. Rozé and Ash take action from the Northern lands.

trailers.title: Code Geass: Rozé of the Recapture | Official Trailer | Disney+ Singapore
